# Upstream source

- Repository: https://github.com/Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
- Branch: `main`
- Imported commit: `cc38e282a87c17c9335310b17e4393b38d144b21`
- License: Apache-2.0

Imported paths:

- `advanced_ai_agents/single_agent_apps/ai_customer_support_agent`
